title: Form Disclaimers
excerpt: Would like a way to either remove or customize the form disclaimer.

posts.author: c2tina (Tina Frost)
posts.cookedHtml:
Would like a way to either remove or customize the form disclaimer.

Screen Shot 2022-06-06 at 9.46.00 AM994×188 21.7 KB

posts.author: Michael-PT (Michael Albers)
posts.cookedHtml:
Although it is a good disclaimer, I completely agree.
At least alter the content, since the content is in English and my forms are in another language. Besides that, I use forms to get info from potential clients through my website and my clients do not need to know (upfront) that details are stored in monday.com

posts.author: Nachliel (Nachliel from Easyapps)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey

Nachliel from Easyapps here

If you are interested in creating styled forms without unwanted prompts and disclaimers that better match’s your brand and embeds perfectly in you web page, you can check out our monday.com app Easyform and our extensive documentation site.

You can set up a free demo here or contact us at support@easyappshq.com.
